ladder.title: Live ladder
ladder.body: You have Core + Pro access. Rankings load through the leaderboard service.
ladder.bodyRemote: Connected to Firestore — summary rows only, with client cache + hourly per-shard upload limits.
ladder.bodyLocalMock: Firebase env not set — showing in-memory mock data for development.
ladder.noNetworkNote: Non-Pro accounts never hit Firestore from this route.
ladder.cacheHit: Serving from local session cache (TTL applies).
ladder.loadError: Could not load rankings. Check Firebase rules and indexes.
ladder.empty: No pilots on this shard yet — be the first upload.
ladder.strengthKgShardHint: This ranking uses squat + bench + deadlift estimated 1RM (kg). Rows uploaded before this change may still show the old score scale—re-save all three lifts and sync to refresh.

rankings.title: Leaderboard
rankings.subtitle: Rows for the current zone and filters.

floatingRank.cta: Tap to jump to my row

userPreview.title: User details
userPreview.error: Unable to load this user right now. Please try again later.
userPreview.radarHiddenAnonymous: This pilot hides ladder identity — radar scores are not shown.

gate.no-score: Save this score to the radar first (or finish the assessment), then upload here.
gate.signed-out: Sign in with Google to upload scores.
gate.anonymous: Use a linked Google account (not guest-only) to upload scores.
gate.no-pro: Pro subscription is required to upload to the live ladder.
gate.invalid-score: Score is not ready to upload yet.

upload.resultUpdated: Uploaded — your ladder row now reflects the current radar score for this shard.
upload.quotaHint: Each ladder shard allows up to {{limit}} uploads per hour (rolling window; limits cloud cost).
upload.quotaAfterSuccess: {{remaining}} upload(s) left this hour ({{limit}} per shard per hour); the window refreshes at {{resetTime}}.
upload.resultRateLimitedDetail: This shard’s hourly cap ({{limit}}) is reached. Try again after {{resetTime}}.
upload.resultError: Upload failed. Check your connection or Firebase rules.

auth.title: Sign in required
auth.body: Use Google sign-in first, then you can upload and sync to ladder.

pro.title: Pro required
pro.body: This feature is Pro-only. Upgrade to upload and join live ladder.

syncAll.hint: Uploads every eligible shard from your Home radar.
syncAll.advancedTip: Uploads run in sequence. Each shard has an hourly upload cap. Shards are skipped or blocked if scores are missing, eligibility fails, or limits are reached.
syncAll.noTargets: No scores are ready to upload yet — complete assessments or save scores to the radar first.
syncAll.summary: Finished {{attempted}} uploads: {{updated}} written, {{rateLimited}} rate limited, {{proRequired}} Pro blocked, {{errors}} errors.

assessmentSync.hint: Uploads all eligible shards for this page in one run.
assessmentSync.advancedTip: Only shards for this page are uploaded. Uploads are skipped or blocked when scores are missing, eligibility fails, or per-shard limits are reached.
assessmentSync.noTargets: No scores on this page are ready to upload yet.

stats_vertical.label: Explosive power
stats_vertical.desc: Composite plus vertical, standing long jump, and sprint sub-rankings (score-based)
